overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character approaching and ascending a grand stone temple with magical purple braziers. The scene transitions from a cobblestone courtyard up a long staircase to the temple entrance, with the camera tilting up to reveal a tall central tower against a dusk sky.

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily across the cobblestone courtyard toward the temple stairs

entered.detail: large stone temple facade with arched windows and central staircase
stone pedestal with magical purple flames
stone pedestal with magical purple flames
stone wing structure with arched gateway
stone wing structure with arched gateway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cobblestone courtyard facing a grand stone temple. Two magical purple braziers flank the approach, and the temple's historic stone architecture dominates the view ahead. The character walks forward toward the central staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase leading to temple entrance

events.description: character transitions from courtyard to ascending the stone staircase
camera tilts upward revealing the tall central tower against the dusk sky

agents.ego_description: character runs up the long stone staircase toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
tall cylindrical tower with red banners rising above the temple

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide stone staircase, transitioning from the open courtyard to the enclosed stairway. The camera tilts upward to reveal a tall central tower with red banners against the blue dusk sky, while the temple facade grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance platform with mosaic floor

events.description: character reaches the top platform and approaches the temple entrance
character slows and stops at the large wooden door

agents.ego_description: character approaches the wooden entrance door, stopping at the temple threshold

entered.detail: large reinforced wooden door with metal studs at the temple entrance
circular patterned stone mosaic on the ground before the door
lit wall-mounted lantern beside the entrance
lit wall-mounted lantern beside the entrance

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters the temple platform where a decorative mosaic lies before a large wooden door. Wall lanterns illuminate the entrance as the character approaches and stops at the threshold, with the massive tower looming overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression from an open cobblestone courtyard toward the imposing entrance of a grand stone temple. It begins with the character walking past magical purple braziers that flank the approach to the historic architecture. As the character ascends the wide stone staircase, the camera tilts upward to reveal a tall central tower adorned with red banners against a deepening blue dusk sky. The scene then shifts from the climb to the temple platform, passing over a decorative mosaic as wall lanterns illuminate the path. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the threshold of a large wooden door with the massive tower looming overhead.
